== Notes for [[Item:Q52396|Q52396]] ==

{geni:about_me} ASIT WAS ATTACKED AND DEFEATED BY ANOTHER CLAN OF KSHATRIYAS. AFTER THIS, HE LEFT AYODHYA AND WENT TO HIMALAYA MOUNTAINS TO LIVE AS AN ASCETIC WITH HIS QUEENS. AT THAT TIME YADAVI QUEEN WAS PREGNANT WITH SAGARA. SAGARA RECAPTURED AYODHYA FROM THE "HAIHAYA" AND "TALJANGHI" KSHHTRIYAS
<p>POSTHUMOUS CHILD OF KING BAHUKA WHOSE WASD PREVENTED FROM BECOMING A SATI BY AUVA RISHI. THE OTHER WIVES OF KING BAHUKAS THEN POISONED HER.. BUT JUST BEFORE HER DEATH SHE GAVE BIRTH TO A HEALTHY CHILD WHO DEVELOPED COMPLETE IMMUNITY TOWARDS THIS POISON. THIS CHILD WAS SAGARA AND HE GREW UP TO BECOME A VERY MIGHTY AND RIGHTEOUS RULER.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
